story: Leighton, raw from a recent divorce and craving a drink, saw a red Audi S5 take a curve too fast, spin out, and flip into a ditch. He stopped his Subaru and ran over. Behind the Audi, leaking fuel had reached a hot metal edge, and a small flame had started under the rear of the car. Looking in, Leighton saw only one person inside—a driver, no passengers. The driver’s side was pinned against an oak, so he hurried to the passenger side. The handle wouldn’t budge: locked. Through the window he could make out short blonde hair and a limp head. He shouted for the driver to wake up.
implausible_knowledge: Behind the Audi, leaking fuel had reached a hot metal edge, and a small flame had started under the rear of the car.
question: What will Leighton most plausibly do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Smash the passenger window immediately and drag the driver out.
answer_without_knowledge: Keep pounding on the window and urging the driver to unlock the passenger door.
